mapper.sql: ga.id, ga.guild_id, ga.game_partition_id, ga.title, ga.content, ga.is_top, ga.publisher_id, ga.created_at, ga.updated_at, g.name as guild_name, u.nick_name as publisher_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM guild_announcement ga LEFT JOIN guild g ON ga.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ga.publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE ga.id IS NOT NULL AND ga.guild_id = #{guildId} AND ga.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') AND ga.is_top = #{isTop} ORDER BY ga.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM guild_announcement ga LEFT JOIN guild g ON ga.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ga.publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE ga.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE guild_announcement SET guild_id = #{guildId}, game_partition_id = #{gamePartitionId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_top = #{isTop}, publisher_id = #{publisherId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM guild_announcement WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE guild_announcement SET is_top = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE guild_announcement SET is_top = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM guild_announcement ga LEFT JOIN guild g ON ga.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ga.publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE ga.is_top = 1 ORDER BY ga.created_at DESC
